main.description: Interaction settings for a log or list, analogous to app.bsky.feed.threadgate/postgate. The record key (rkey) must match the rkey of the gated record. Absence of a gate record means everyone can interact.

subject.description: The log or list this gate applies to.

allow.description: Rules for who can comment. Absent means everyone; an empty array or a nobody rule means no one.

hiddenComments.description: AT-URIs of comments the author has hidden.

followingRule.description: Allow comments from actors the author follows.

followerRule.description: Allow comments from actors who follow the author.
